questionHtml: Compare and contrast the combustion of an s-block metal and a p-block non-metal.
markschemeHtml:
both are oxidation reactions ✓


s-block metals produce ionic oxides AND p-block non-metals produce covalent oxides
OR
s-block metals produce basic oxides AND  p-block non-metals produce acid oxides ✓

meta.title: Compare and contrast the combustion of an s-block metal and a p-block non-metal.
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 1.3.1—Reactive metals, non-metals and organic compounds undergo combustion reactions when heated in oxygen. Deduce equations for reactions of combustion, including hydrocarbons and alcohols.
